_comment: Manually-verified scores for matches the openfootball feed hasn't published yet. The build always PREFERS the live feed and only uses these to fill gaps, so each entry becomes a harmless no-op once the feed catches up (and can be deleted any time). Match keys (date + team1 + team2) must match the openfootball feed exactly — including play-off placeholder names like 'UEFA Path D winner'. Sources: ESPN, FIFA.com, Sky Sports, CBS Sports, NBC News.

matches.source: South Korea 2-1 Czech Republic — ESPN/FOX/Sky Sports
